purpose: Builder-ready brief for the first Skillfoundry product targeting AgenticMarket.

sources.notes: Selected first opportunity and ranking rationale.
Distribution constraints for the first launch surface.

content.body: Build `bottleneck-radar`, a hosted MCP server that turns noisy builder signals into ranked bottlenecks and concise opportunity briefs.
Primary users are solo AI builders and small technical automation agencies already using MCP-capable tools and evaluating new developer leverage quickly.
Keep the first release narrow: `analyze_signals` for clustering and ranking evidence-backed bottlenecks, plus `draft_brief` for turning one bottleneck into a product brief.

The server must be deployed at a public HTTPS endpoint, expose discoverable tools, and ship with listing-ready documentation because AgenticMarket constrains post-publish changes to name, URL, and price.
Initial launch hypothesis: $0.08 per successful call, published unlisted first to validate install-to-value and listing clarity before broader visibility.

promotion.notes: First product brief candidate aligned to the AgenticMarket launch loop.
